Package org.eventb.core.ast

Interface IFormulaRewriter2

All Superinterfaces:
IFormulaRewriter
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractRewriterImpl, AndOrDistRewriterImpl, ArithRewriterImpl, AutoRewriterImpl, BoundIdentifierDecomposer, CompUnionDistRewriterImpl, ContImplRewriter, ConvRewriterImpl, DefaultRewriter, DisjunctionToImplicationRewriter, DomCompRewriterImpl, DomDistLeftRewriterImpl, DomDistRightRewriterImpl, DomRanUnionDistRewriterImpl, DoubleImplicationRewriter, EqvRewriterImpl, ImpAndRewriterImpl, ImpOrRewriterImpl, InclusionSetMinusLeftRewriterImpl, InclusionSetMinusRightRewriterImpl, PartitionRewriterImpl, PredicateSimplifier, RanCompRewriterImpl, RanDistLeftRewriterImpl, RanDistRightRewriterImpl, RelImgUnionLeftRewriterImpl, RelImgUnionRightRewriterImpl, RelOvrRewriterImpl, RemoveInclusionRewriterImpl, RemoveInclusionUniversalRewriterImpl, RemoveMembershipRewriterImpl, RemoveNegationRewriterImpl, SetEqlRewriterImpl, SetMinusRewriterImpl, StrictInclusionRewriterImpl, TypeRewriterImpl, UnionInterDistRewriterImpl
public interface IFormulaRewriter2 extends IFormulaRewriter
This interface extends IFormulaRewriter to add support for predicate variables.
Since:
1.2
